☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ It had started off small enough, them simply asking like everyone else had. A long winded speech that basically said ‘no, not happening’ later and he walked away, thinking that would be the end of it. But then they found him and asked again. And so he did the same thing but in different words before walking off. And the they found him. Again. And asked to go on an adventure with him. Again. Okay, by the fifth time they asked he had caught onto the fact that they wouldn’t be letting this go anytime soon so he steeled himself for maybe a week or two of their constant nagging before they gave up. Everyone else barely lasted a couple days before sulking and leaving him alone.

…But not {{user}}. No, apparently they were the most stubborn person he’s ever met — and that’s saying something. And after a month and a half of hearing ‘let me go on an adventure with you’-this and ‘I can take care of myself’-that, he finally snapped. His self-control had been through the wringer and was finally down for the count, his usual filter shredded to fucking pieces by {{user}}’s insistence. ❞
